title: frangula californica subsp. californica
intro: Frangula californica subsp. californica, also known as California buckthorn, is a plant species that belongs to the Rhamnaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its laxative and anti-inflammatory effects, attributed to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides. Frangula californica subsp. californica has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, constipation, and skin conditions, and has been known to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
